string.name: Reason_File
string.value: Operate file in application file system

string.value: Tips:Please enter the email type in the correct format, such as @qq.com or @163.com

string.value: The dialog box has been closed, and the option to enter a different type of email has been unselected

string.name: Email_type_must_contain_one_and_can_only_contain_one
string.value: Email type must contain one @ and can only contain one @

string.name: The_email_type_must_contain_a_And_it_can_only_contain_one
string.value: The email type must contain a ., And it can only contain one

string.name: In_email_types_needs_to_be_before_such_as_mail
string.value: In email types, @ needs to be before., such as @qq.com, @163.com, etc

string.value: Except for @ and. in email types, Must contain other characters

string.value: @ must be first in the email type

string.value: Click on the email after the account to switch email types

string.value: Do you want to enable SSL/TLS (currently only supporting SMTP, not SMTPS, this button is temporarily unavailable)

string.value: This is the OH testing topic

string.name: This_is_the_text_of_the_OpenHarmony_email_for_testing
string.value: This is the text of the OpenHarmony email for testing. The format for the recipient, cc, and confidential cc of the email is: someone<someone@your-email.com>, another<another@your-email.com> Multiple accounts are connected by commas in English.

string.name: No_attachments_available_at_the_moment
string.value: No attachments available at the moment

string.name: Format
string.value: Format: xx<xx@yxx.com>, xx<xx@yxx.com> Multiple accounts are connected by commas in English.

string.value: Large attachments need to be manually pushed into the device sandbox, and only the first one should be selected from multiple large attachments

string.value: Account not logged in, please login again
